## 🤖 Assistant #2 (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking, Agent)

_2025-12-27 06:23Z_

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> The user is reporting an error with the `better-sqlite3` native module on macOS. The error message indicates:
>
> ```
> dlopen(/Users/Clark/.vscode/extensions/clarkzhang.llm-chat-history-0.3.2/node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node, 0x0001): tried: '/Users/Clark/.vscode/extensions/clarkzhang.llm-chat-history-0.3.2/node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node' (not a mach-o file)
> ```
>
> This is a classic issue where:
> 1. The extension was built/packaged on one platform (Windows, based on the user's current OS)
> 2. But the user trying to use it is on macOS
>
> The `better-sqlite3` module is a native Node.js addon that needs to be compiled for each specific platform (Windows, macOS, Linux) and architecture (x64, arm64).
>
> The error "not a mach-o file" means the binary that's included is not a valid macOS executable - it's likely a Windows .node file (which is essentially a DLL).
>
> Let me look at the project to understand how native modules are being handled:
>
> 1. First, I should check the `package.json` to see the current configuration
> 2. Look at any existing scripts that handle native module building/downloading
> 3. Check the `sqlite-loader.ts` file which seems to handle SQLite loading
>
> This is a cross-platform native module distribution issue. The solution typically involves:
> 1. Using `@vscode/vsce` with proper platform-specific packaging
> 2. Using prebuild binaries for all platforms
> 3. Or using a different approach like `sql.js` which is pure JavaScript
>
> Let me investigate the codebase.

</details>

'cursor';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Check process arguments and working directory\r\n        const cwd = process.cwd();\r\n        const execPath = process.execPath;\r\n\r\n        if (execPath 'Cursor' : 'VS Code';\r\n\r\n        let instructions = '';\r\n\r\n        if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n            instructions = this.translator('error.sqliteWindowsInstructions');\r\n        } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n            instructions = this.translator('error.sqliteMacInstructions');\r\n        } else {\r\n            instructions = this.translator('error.sqliteLinuxInstructions');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 自定义错误消息，根据 IDE 类型调整\r\n        const binaryIncompatibleMsg = ideType === 'cursor'\r\n            ? `这是因为您的 ${ideName} 版本 (${electronVersion}) 需要较新的 SQLite 二进制文件，但扩展包中包含的是旧版本。`\r\n            : this.translator('error.sqliteBinaryIncompatible', { version: electronVersion });\r\n\r\n        const message = [\r\n            this.translator('error.sqliteInitFailed'),\r\n            '',\r\n            binaryIncompatibleMsg,\r\n            '',\r\n            this.translator('error.sqliteCompilationFailed'),\r\n            this.translator('error.sqliteBuildToolsRequired'),\r\n            '',\r\n            this.translator('error.sqliteSolutionTitle'),\r\n            instructions,\r\n            '',\r\n            this.translator('error.sqliteAlternative')\r\n        ].join('\\n');\r\n\r\n        return new Error(message);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Get better-sqlite3 module\r\n     * Only call after ensureLoaded() succeeds\r\n     */\r\n    getDatabase(): any {\r\n        return require('better-sqlite3');\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

## 🤖 Assistant #7 (Agent)

_2025-12-27 06:24Z_

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> Now I understand the issue. The project attempts to handle cross-platform native modules, but the current approach has a critical problem:
>
> 1. `download-all-binaries.js` only downloads binaries for the **current platform** - it doesn't download binaries for all platforms (Windows, macOS, Linux) and all architectures (x64, arm64)
>
> 2. The `prebuild-install` command in `download-all-binaries.js` doesn't specify a platform - it only downloads for the current platform where the script runs
>
> 3. When the extension is packaged on Windows, only Windows binaries are included. When a macOS user installs it, there are no macOS binaries available.
>
> The error message confirms this: `not a mach-o file` means the binary is not a valid macOS executable (likely a Windows DLL).
>
> The solution needs to:
> 1. Download binaries for ALL platforms (win32, darwin, linux) and architectures (x64, arm64)
> 2. Include them in the package
> 3. At runtime, select the correct binary based on the current platform and architecture
>
> Let me check if there's a way to modify the download script to download binaries for all platforms.
>
> Looking at prebuild-install documentation, it supports `--platform` and `--arch` flags.
>
> For better-sqlite3, the available prebuilds are:
> - darwin-arm64
> - darwin-x64
> - linux-arm64
> - linux-x64
> - win32-ia32
> - win32-x64
>
> Let me update the script to handle this properly.

</details>

Now I understand the issue. The problem is that the `download-all-binaries.js` script only downloads binaries for the **current platform** where the build runs. When you package the extension on Windows, only Windows binaries are included. When a macOS user installs it, there are no compatible macOS binaries.

Let me fix this by updating the download script to fetch binaries for **all platforms and architectures**:

  "contents": "#!/usr/bin/env node\n/**\n * Download all required SQLite3 binaries for different Electron versions,\n * platforms, and architectures.\n * This ensures compatibility across VS Code and Cursor on all supported systems.\n */\n\nconst { execSync } = require('child_process');\nconst path = require('path');\nconst fs = require('fs');\n\nconsole.log('Downloading SQLite3 binaries for multiple platforms and Electron versions...');\n\n// Target Electron versions for different IDEs\nconst targetVersions = [\n    '32.0.0', // Older VS Code versions\n    '33.0.0', // VS Code intermediate\n    '34.0.0', // VS Code intermediate\n    '35.0.0', // VS Code intermediate\n    '36.0.0', // VS Code intermediate\n    '37.0.0', // Cursor 2.x (Electron 37.x)\n    '38.0.0', // VS Code intermediate\n    '39.0.0', // VS Code 1.93+ (Electron 39.x)\n    '40.0.0', // Future VS Code versions\n    '41.0.0', // Future versions\n];\n\n// All supported platforms and architectures\nconst platforms = [\n    { platform: 'win32', arch: 'x64' },\n    { platform: 'win32', arch: 'ia32' },\n    { platform: 'darwin', arch: 'x64' },\n    { platform: 'darwin', arch: 'arm64' },\n    { platform: 'linux', arch: 'x64' },\n    { platform: 'linux', arch: 'arm64' },\n];\n\nconst sqlitePath = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\nconst binaryDir = path.join(sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release');\n\n// Ensure binary directory exists\nif (!fs.existsSync(binaryDir)) {\n    fs.mkdirSync(binaryDir, { recursive: true });\n}\n\nconsole.log(`Binary directory: ${binaryDir}`);\n\nlet successCount = 0;\nlet failCount = 0;\n\nfor (const { platform, arch } of platforms) {\n    for (const version of targetVersions) {\n        const binaryName = `better_sqlite3-electron-${version}-${platform}-${arch}.node`;\n        const binaryPath = path.join(binaryDir, binaryName);\n\n        // Skip if already downloaded\n        if (fs.existsSync(binaryPath)) {\n            console.log(`⏭️  Skipping ${binaryName} (already exists)`);\n            successCount++;\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            console.log(`\\n📦 Downloading binary for Electron ${version} ${platform}-${arch}...`);\n\n            // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\n            const originalCwd = process.cwd();\n            process.chdir(sqlitePath);\n\n            try {\n                // Use prebuild-install with platform and arch flags\n                const prebuildBin = process.platform === 'win32'\n                    ? path.join('..', '.bin', 'prebuild-install.cmd')\n                    : path.join('..', '.bin', 'prebuild-install');\n\n                const prebuildCmd = `\"${prebuildBin}\" --runtime electron --target ${version} --platform ${platform} --arch ${arch} --force`;\n\n                execSync(prebuildCmd, { stdio: 'pipe', timeout: 60000 });\n\n                // Check if binary was downloaded\n                const downloadedPath = path.join(binaryDir, 'better_sqlite3.node');\n                if (fs.existsSync(downloadedPath)) {\n                    // Rename the downloaded binary to include version/platform/arch\n                    fs.renameSync(downloadedPath, binaryPath);\n                    console.log(`✅ Successfully downloaded: ${binaryName}`);\n                    successCount++;\n                } else {\n                    console.log(`⚠️  No binary downloaded for Electron ${version} ${platform}-${arch}`);\n                    failCount++;\n                }\n\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.log(`⚠️  Failed to download for Electron ${version} ${platform}-${arch}: ${error.message}`);\n                failCount++;\n            } finally {\n                process.chdir(originalCwd);\n            }\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.log(`❌ Error processing Electron ${version} ${platform}-${arch}: ${error.message}`);\n            failCount++;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// List all downloaded binaries\nconsole.log('\\n📋 Downloaded binaries:');\nconst binaries = fs.readdirSync(binaryDir).filter(file => file.endsWith('.node'));\n\n// Group by platform\nconst byPlatform = {};\nbinaries.forEach(binary => {\n    const stats = fs.statSync(path.join(binaryDir, binary));\n    const sizeMB = (stats.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2);\n\n    // Extract platform from filename\n    let platform = 'unknown';\n    if (binary.includes('win32')) platform = 'Windows';\n    else if (binary.includes('darwin')) platform = 'macOS';\n    else if (binary.includes('linux')) platform = 'Linux';\n    else platform = 'Default';\n\n    if (!byPlatform[platform]) byPlatform[platform] = [];\n    byPlatform[platform].push({ name: binary, size: sizeMB });\n});\n\nObject.entries(byPlatform).forEach(([platform, files]) => {\n    console.log(`\\n  ${platform}:`);\n    files.forEach(({ name, size }) => {\n        console.log(`    ${name}: ${size} MB`);\n    });\n});\n\nconst totalSize = binaries.reduce((total, binary) => {\n    const stats = fs.statSync(path.join(binaryDir, binary));\n    return total + stats.size;\n}, 0);\n\nconsole.log(`\\n📊 Summary:`);\nconsole.log(`  Total binaries: ${binaries.length}`);\nconsole.log(`  Downloaded: ${successCount}, Failed: ${failCount}`);\nconsole.log(`  Total size: ${(totalSize / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2)} MB`);\n\n// Create a platform-specific default fallback for current platform\nconst currentPlatform = process.platform;\nconst currentArch = process.arch;\nconst defaultBinaryPath = path.join(binaryDir, 'better_sqlite3.node');\n\n// Find the best matching binary for the current platform\nconst matchingBinaries = binaries.filter(b =>\n    b.includes(`-${currentPlatform}-${currentArch}.node`)\n).sort().reverse(); // Sort descending to get newest version first\n\nif (matchingBinaries.length > 0 && !fs.existsSync(defaultBinaryPath)) {\n    const bestMatch = matchingBinaries[0];\n    fs.copyFileSync(\n        path.join(binaryDir, bestMatch),\n        defaultBinaryPath\n    );\n    console.log(`\\n📋 Created default fallback for current platform: ${bestMatch} -> better_sqlite3.node`);\n} else if (binaries.length > 0 && !fs.existsSync(defaultBinaryPath)) {\n    // If no matching binary for current platform, use the first available as fallback\n    const firstBinary = binaries[0];\n    fs.copyFileSync(\n        path.join(binaryDir, firstBinary),\n        defaultBinaryPath\n    );\n    console.log(`\\n⚠️  Created fallback from non-matching binary: ${firstBinary} -> better_sqlite3.node`);\n}\n\nconsole.log('\\n✅ Binary download complete!');\nconsole.log('\\n⚠️  Note: The extension package will be larger due to multiple platform binaries.');\nconsole.log('   This is necessary to ensure cross-platform compatibility.');\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "#!/usr/bin/env node\r\n/**\r\n * Download all required SQLite3 binaries for different Electron versions,\r\n * platforms, and architectures.\r\n * This ensures compatibility across VS Code and Cursor on all supported systems.\r\n */\r\n\r\nconst { execSync } = require('child_process');\r\nconst path = require('path');\r\nconst fs = require('fs');\r\n\r\nconsole.log('Downloading SQLite3 binaries for multiple platforms and Electron versions...');\r\n\r\n// Target Electron versions for different IDEs\r\nconst targetVersions = [\r\n    '32.0.0', // Older VS Code versions\r\n    '33.0.0', // VS Code intermediate\r\n    '34.0.0', // VS Code intermediate\r\n    '35.0.0', // VS Code intermediate\r\n    '36.0.0', // VS Code intermediate\r\n    '37.0.0', // Cursor 2.x (Electron 37.x)\r\n    '38.0.0', // VS Code intermediate\r\n    '39.0.0', // VS Code 1.93+ (Electron 39.x)\r\n    '40.0.0', // Future VS Code versions\r\n    '41.0.0', // Future versions\r\n];\r\n\r\n// All supported platforms and architectures\r\nconst platforms = [\r\n    { platform: 'win32', arch: 'x64' },\r\n    { platform: 'win32', arch: 'ia32' },\r\n    { platform: 'darwin', arch: 'x64' },\r\n    { platform: 'darwin', arch: 'arm64' },\r\n    { platform: 'linux', arch: 'x64' },\r\n    { platform: 'linux', arch: 'arm64' },\r\n];\r\n\r\nconst sqlitePath = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\r\nconst binaryDir = path.join(sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release');\r\n\r\n// Ensure binary directory exists\r\nif (!fs.existsSync(binaryDir)) {\r\n    fs.mkdirSync(binaryDir, { recursive: true });\r\n}\r\n\r\nconsole.log(`Binary directory: ${binaryDir}`);\r\n\r\nlet successCount = 0;\r\nlet failCount = 0;\r\n\r\nfor (const { platform, arch } of platforms) {\r\n    for (const version of targetVersions) {\r\n        const binaryName = `better_sqlite3-electron-${version}-${platform}-${arch}.node`;\r\n        const binaryPath = path.join(binaryDir, binaryName);\r\n\r\n        // Skip if already downloaded\r\n        if (fs.existsSync(binaryPath)) {\r\n            console.log(`⏭️  Skipping ${binaryName} (already exists)`);\r\n            successCount++;\r\n            continue;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        try {\r\n            console.log(`\\n📦 Downloading binary for Electron ${version} ${platform}-${arch}...`);\r\n\r\n            // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\r\n            const originalCwd = process.cwd();\r\n            process.chdir(sqlitePath);\r\n\r\n            try {\r\n                // Use prebuild-install with platform and arch flags\r\n                const prebuildBin = process.platform === 'win32'\r\n                    ? path.join('..', '.bin', 'prebuild-install.cmd')\r\n                    : path.join('..', '.bin', 'prebuild-install');\r\n\r\n                const prebuildCmd = `\"${prebuildBin}\" --runtime electron --target ${version} --platform ${platform} --arch ${arch} --force`;\r\n\r\n                execSync(prebuildCmd, { stdio: 'pipe', timeout: 60000 });\r\n\r\n                // Check if binary was downloaded\r\n                const downloadedPath = path.join(binaryDir, 'better_sqlite3.node');\r\n                if (fs.existsSync(downloadedPath)) {\r\n                    // Rename the downloaded binary to include version/platform/arch\r\n                    fs.renameSync(downloadedPath, binaryPath);\r\n                    console.log(`✅ Successfully downloaded: ${binaryName}`);\r\n                    successCount++;\r\n                } else {\r\n                    console.log(`⚠️  No binary downloaded for Electron ${version} ${platform}-${arch}`);\r\n                    failCount++;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.log(`⚠️  Failed to download for Electron ${version} ${platform}-${arch}: ${error.message}`);\r\n                failCount++;\r\n            } finally {\r\n                process.chdir(originalCwd);\r\n            }\r\n\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.log(`❌ Error processing Electron ${version} ${platform}-${arch}: ${error.message}`);\r\n            failCount++;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// List all downloaded binaries\r\nconsole.log('\\n📋 Downloaded binaries:');\r\nconst binaries = fs.readdirSync(binaryDir).filter(file => file.endsWith('.node'));\r\n\r\n// Group by platform\r\nconst byPlatform = {};\r\nbinaries.forEach(binary => {\r\n    const stats = fs.statSync(path.join(binaryDir, binary));\r\n    const sizeMB = (stats.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2);\r\n\r\n    // Extract platform from filename\r\n    let platform = 'unknown';\r\n    if (binary.includes('win32')) platform = 'Windows';\r\n    else if (binary.includes('darwin')) platform = 'macOS';\r\n    else if (binary.includes('linux')) platform = 'Linux';\r\n    else platform = 'Default';\r\n\r\n    if (!byPlatform[platform]) byPlatform[platform] = [];\r\n    byPlatform[platform].push({ name: binary, size: sizeMB });\r\n});\r\n\r\nObject.entries(byPlatform).forEach(([platform, files]) => {\r\n    console.log(`\\n  ${platform}:`);\r\n    files.forEach(({ name, size }) => {\r\n        console.log(`    ${name}: ${size} MB`);\r\n    });\r\n});\r\n\r\nconst totalSize = binaries.reduce((total, binary) => {\r\n    const stats = fs.statSync(path.join(binaryDir, binary));\r\n    return total + stats.size;\r\n}, ${(totalSize / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2)} MB`);\r\n\r\n// Create a platform-specific default fallback for current platform\r\nconst currentPlatform = process.platform;\r\nconst currentArch = process.arch;\r\nconst defaultBinaryPath = path.join(binaryDir, 'better_sqlite3.node');\r\n\r\n// Find the best matching binary for the current platform\r\nconst matchingBinaries = binaries.filter(b =>\r\n    b.includes(`-${currentPlatform}-${currentArch}.node`)\r\n).sort().reverse(); // Sort descending to get newest version first\r\n\r\nif (matchingBinaries.length > 0 && console.log(`\\n📋 Created default fallback for current platform: ${bestMatch} -> better_sqlite3.node`);\r\n} else if (binaries.length > 0 && !fs.existsSync(defaultBinaryPath)) {\r\n    // If no matching binary for current platform, use the first available as fallback\r\n    const firstBinary = binaries[0];\r\n    fs.copyFileSync(\r\n        path.join(binaryDir, firstBinary),\r\n        defaultBinaryPath\r\n    );\r\n    console.log(`\\n⚠️  Created fallback from non-matching binary: ${firstBinary} -> better_sqlite3.node`);\r\n}\r\n\r\nconsole.log('\\n✅ Binary download   "old_string": "    /**\n     * Try to use pre-packaged binary for the current Electron version\n     */\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\n        // Get IDE-specific recommended versions\n        const versionsToTry = this.getRecommendedVersions(electronVersion);\n\n        // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\n        const originalCwd = process.cwd();\n        process.chdir(this.sqlitePath);\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试使用预打包的版本化二进制文件\n            for (const version of versionsToTry) {\n                const versionedBinary = path.join('build', 'Release', `better_sqlite3-${version}.node`);\n                if (fs.existsSync(versionedBinary)) {\n                    console.log(`✅ Using pre-packaged binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    // Copy the versioned binary to the expected location\n                    const targetPath = path.join('build', 'Release', 'better_sqlite3.node');\n                    fs.copyFileSync(versionedBinary, targetPath);\n                    return;\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('No pre-packaged binaries found for current Electron version');\n\n            // 如果没有任何可用的二进制文件，使用默认的\n            const defaultBinary = path.join('build', 'Release', 'better_sqlite3.node');\n            if (fs.existsSync(defaultBinary)) {\n                console.log('Using default binary as fallback');\n                return;\n            }\n\n            throw new Error('No compatible SQLite3 binary found. Please reinstall the extension.');\n\n        } finally {\n            process.chdir(originalCwd);\n        }\n    }",
  "new_string": "    /**\n     * Try to use pre-packaged binary for the current Electron version and platform\n     */\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\n        // Get IDE-specific recommended versions\n        const versionsToTry = this.getRecommendedVersions(electronVersion);\n        const platform = process.platform; // 'win32', 'darwin', 'linux'\n        const arch = process.arch; // 'x64', 'arm64', 'ia32'\n\n        const binaryDir = path.join(this.sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release');\n        const targetPath = path.join(binaryDir, 'better_sqlite3.node');\n\n        console.log(`Looking for binary: platform=${platform}, arch=${arch}`);\n\n        // Try to find a matching binary for current platform/arch and electron version\n        for (const version of versionsToTry) {\n            // New naming convention: better_sqlite3-electron-{version}-{platform}-{arch}.node\n            const binaryName = `better_sqlite3-electron-${version}-${platform}-${arch}.node`;\n            const binaryPath = path.join(binaryDir, binaryName);\n\n            if (fs.existsSync(binaryPath)) {\n                console.log(`✅ Using pre-packaged binary: ${binaryName}`);\n                fs.copyFileSync(binaryPath, targetPath);\n                return;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Fallback: try old naming convention (backwards compatibility)\n        for (const version of versionsToTry) {\n            const oldBinaryName = `better_sqlite3-${version}.node`;\n            const oldBinaryPath = path.join(binaryDir, oldBinaryName);\n\n            if (fs.existsSync(oldBinaryPath)) {\n                console.log(`✅ Using legacy pre-packaged binary: ${oldBinaryName}`);\n                fs.copyFileSync(oldBinaryPath, targetPath);\n                return;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Try to find ANY binary for the current platform/arch\n        if (fs.existsSync(binaryDir)) {\n            const files = fs.readdirSync(binaryDir);\n            const platformBinaries = files.filter(f =>\n                f.endsWith('.node') &&\n                f.includes(`-${platform}-${arch}.node`)\n            ).sort().reverse(); // Prefer newer versions\n\n            if (platformBinaries.length > 0) {\n                const bestMatch = platformBinaries[0];\n                console.log(`✅ Using best available platform binary: ${bestMatch}`);\n                fs.copyFileSync(path.join(binaryDir, bestMatch), targetPath);\n                return;\n            }\n        }\n\n        console.log('No pre-packaged binaries found for current platform/architecture');\n\n        // If the default binary exists, check if it's compatible\n        if (fs.existsSync(targetPath)) {\n            console.log('Using existing default binary as fallback');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        throw new Error(\n            `No compatible SQLite3 binary found for ${platform}-${arch}. ` +\n            `Please reinstall the extension or report this issue.`\n        );\n    }"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * SQLite loader with automatic version detection and download\r\n * Ensures better-sqlite3 works across different Electron versions\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport { execSync } from 'child_process';\r\nimport { createTranslator, resolveLocale } from './i18n';\r\n\r\nexport class SqliteLoader {\r\n    private extensionPath: string;\r\n    private sqlitePath: string;\r\n    private binaryPath: string;\r\n    private translator: ReturnType<typeof createTranslator>;\r\n\r\n    constructor(extensionPath: string) {\r\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath;\r\n        this.sqlitePath = path.join(extensionPath, 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\r\n        this.binaryPath = path.join(this.sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release', 'better_sqlite3.node');\r\n        this.translator = createTranslator(vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').get('locale'));\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Ensure better-sqlite3 is properly loaded\r\n     * Downloads correct binary if needed\r\n     */\r\n    async ensureLoaded(): Promise<boolean> {\r\n        // Check if binary exists and is loadable\r\n        if (await this.testBinary()) {\r\n            console.log('✅ better-sqlite3 binary is already compatible');\r\n            return true;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Binary doesn't exist or is incompatible, download correct version\r\n        console.log('⚠️  better-sqlite3 binary needs to be downloaded/updated');\r\n\r\n        // Show progress to user\r\n        return await vscode.window.withProgress({\r\n            location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\r\n            title: 'Setting up database module...',\r\n            cancellable: false\r\n        }, async (progress) => {\r\n            try {\r\n                progress.report({ message: this.translator('info.sqliteDetectingIDE') });\r\n                const ideType = this.detectIDEType();\r\n                const electronVersion = this.detectElectronVersion();\r\n\r\n                const ideName = ideType === 'cursor' ? 'Cursor' : ideType === 'vscode' ? 'VS Code' : 'Unknown IDE';\r\n                console.log(this.translator('info.sqliteDetected', { ide: ideName, version: electronVersion }));\r\n\r\n                progress.report({ message: 'Downloading compatible binary...' });\r\n                await this.downloadBinary(electronVersion);\r\n\r\n                progress.report({ message: 'Verifying installation...' });\r\n                const success = await this.testBinary();\r\n\r\n                if (success) {\r\n                    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Database module setup complete!');\r\n                    return true;\r\n                } else {\r\n                    throw new Error('Binary verification failed');\r\n                }\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Failed to setup better-sqlite3:', error);\r\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\r\n                    'Failed to setup database module. The extension may not work correctly.',\r\n                    'View Logs'\r\n                ).then(selection => {\r\n                    if (selection === 'View Logs') {\r\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\r\n                    }\r\n                });\r\n                return false;\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Test if current binary is loadable\r\n     */\r\n    private async testBinary(): Promise<boolean> {\r\n        if (!fs.existsSync(this.binaryPath)) {\r\n            console.log('Binary does not exist:', this.binaryPath);\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        try {\r\n            // Try to load the module\r\n            const Database = require('better-sqlite3');\r\n            // Try to create an in-memory database\r\n            const db = new Database(':memory:');\r\n            db.close();\r\n            return true;\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.log('Binary exists but is not compatible:', error);\r\n            // If binary exists but is incompatible, we need to download a new one\r\n            // Return false so ensureLoaded will call downloadBinary\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Detect current IDE type (VS Code or Cursor)\r\n     */\r\n    private detectIDEType(): 'vscode' | 'cursor' | 'unknown' {\r\n        // Check environment variables\r\n        if (process.env.CURSOR_PID || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER) {\r\n            return 'cursor';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Check process arguments and working directory\r\n        const cwd = process.cwd();\r\n        const execPath = process.execPath;\r\n\r\n        if (execPath && execPath.toLowerCase().includes('cursor')) {\r\n            return 'cursor';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (cwd && cwd.toLowerCase().includes('cursor')) {\r\n            return 'cursor';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Check VS Code specific variables\r\n        if (process.env.VSCODE_CWD || process.env.VSCODE_PID) {\r\n            return 'vscode';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Default to VS Code if uncertain\r\n        return 'vscode';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Detect VS Code/Cursor Electron version\r\n     */\r\n    private detectElectronVersion(): string {\r\n        // Get Electron version from process.versions\r\n        const electronVersion = process.versions.electron;\r\n\r\n        if (!electronVersion) {\r\n            console.warn('Could not detect Electron version, using fallback');\r\n            return '37.0.0'; // Fallback to common version\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Extract major version (e.g., \"37.7.0\" -> \"37\")\r\n        const majorVersion = electronVersion.split('.')[0];\r\n        return `${majorVersion}.0.0`;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Get recommended Electron versions for current IDE\r\n     */\r\n    private getRecommendedVersions(electronVersion: string): string[] {\r\n        const ideType = this.detectIDEType();\r\n        const majorVersion = parseInt(electronVersion.split('.')[0]);\r\n\r\n        console.log(`Detected IDE: ${ideType}, Electron version: ${electronVersion}`);\r\n\r\n        // IDE-specific version preferences\r\n        if (ideType === 'cursor') {\r\n            // Cursor 2.x typically uses Electron 37.x\r\n            return [\r\n                electronVersion,  // Detected version first\r\n                '37.0.0',        // Electron 37 (Cursor 2.x stable)\r\n                '36.0.0',        // Electron 36\r\n                '38.0.0',        // Electron 38 (fallback)\r\n                '39.0.0',        // Electron 39 (fallback)\r\n                '35.0.0',        // Electron 35\r\n            ];\r\n        } else {\r\n            // VS Code versions (typically newer)\r\n            return [\r\n                electronVersion,  // Detected version first\r\n                '39.0.0',        // Electron 39 (VS Code 1.93+)\r\n                '38.0.0',        // Electron 38\r\n                '37.0.0',        // Electron 37\r\n                '36.0.0',        // Electron 36\r\n                '35.0.0',        // Electron 35\r\n                '34.0.0',        // Electron 34\r\n            ];\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Try to use pre-packaged binary for the current Electron version and platform\r\n     */\r\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\r\n        // Get IDE-specific recommended versions\r\n        const versionsToTry = this.getRecommendedVersions(electronVersion);\r\n        const platform = process.platform; // 'win32', 'darwin', 'linux'\r\n        const arch = process.arch; // 'x64', 'arm64', 'ia32'\r\n\r\n        const binaryDir = path.join(this.sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release');\r\n        const targetPath = path.join(binaryDir, 'better_sqlite3.node');\r\n\r\n        console.log(`Looking for binary: platform=${platform}, arch=${arch}`);\r\n\r\n        // Try to find a matching binary for current platform/arch and electron version\r\n        for (const version of versionsToTry) {\r\n            // New naming convention: better_sqlite3-electron-{version}-{platform}-{arch}.node\r\n            const binaryName = `better_sqlite3-electron-${version}-${platform}-${arch}.node`;\r\n            const binaryPath = path.join(binaryDir, binaryName);\r\n\r\n            if (fs.existsSync(binaryPath)) {\r\n                console.log(`✅ Using pre-packaged binary: ${binaryName}`);\r\n                fs.copyFileSync(binaryPath, targetPath);\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Fallback: try old naming convention (backwards compatibility)\r\n        for (const version of versionsToTry) {\r\n            const oldBinaryName = `better_sqlite3-${version}.node`;\r\n            const oldBinaryPath = path.join(binaryDir, oldBinaryName);\r\n\r\n            if (fs.existsSync(oldBinaryPath)) {\r\n                console.log(`✅ Using legacy pre-packaged binary: ${oldBinaryName}`);\r\n                fs.copyFileSync(oldBinaryPath, targetPath);\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Try to find ANY binary for the current platform/arch\r\n        if (fs.existsSync(binaryDir)) {\r\n            const files = fs.readdirSync(binaryDir);\r\n            const platformBinaries = files.filter(f =>\r\n                f.endsWith('.node') &&\r\n                f.includes(`-${platform}-${arch}.node`)\r\n            ).sort().reverse(); // Prefer newer versions\r\n\r\n            if (platformBinaries.length > 0) {\r\n                const bestMatch = platformBinaries[0];\r\n                console.log(`✅ Using best available platform binary: ${bestMatch}`);\r\n                fs.copyFileSync(path.join(binaryDir, bestMatch), targetPath);\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        console.log('No pre-packaged binaries found for current platform/architecture');\r\n\r\n        // If the default binary exists, check if it's compatible\r\n        if (fs.existsSync(targetPath)) {\r\n            console.log('Using existing default binary as fallback');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        throw new Error(\r\n            `No compatible SQLite3 binary found for ${platform}-${arch}. ` +\r\n            `Please reinstall the extension or report this issue.`\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Create a user-friendly error message using i18n\r\n     */\r\n    private createUserFriendlyError(electronVersion: string): Error {\r\n        const platform = process.platform;\r\n        const ideType = this.detectIDEType();\r\n        const ideName = ideType === 'cursor' ? 'Cursor' : 'VS Code';\r\n\r\n        let instructions = '';\r\n\r\n        if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n            instructions = this.translator('error.sqliteWindowsInstructions');\r\n        } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n            instructions = this.translator('error.sqliteMacInstructions');\r\n        } else {\r\n            instructions = this.translator('error.sqliteLinuxInstructions');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 自定义错误消息，根据 IDE 类型调整\r\n        const binaryIncompatibleMsg = ideType === 'cursor'\r\n            ? `这是因为您的 ${ideName} 版本 (${electronVersion}) 需要较新的 SQLite 二进制文件，但扩展包中包含的是旧版本。`\r\n            : this.translator('error.sqliteBinaryIncompatible', { version: electronVersion });\r\n\r\n        const message = [\r\n            this.translator('error.sqliteInitFailed'),\r\n            '',\r\n            binaryIncompatibleMsg,\r\n            '',\r\n            this.translator('error.sqliteCompilationFailed'),\r\n            this.translator('error.sqliteBuildToolsRequired'),\r\n            '',\r\n            this.translator('error.sqliteSolutionTitle'),\r\n            instructions,\r\n            '',\r\n            this.translator('error.sqliteAlternative')\r\n        ].join('\\n');\r\n\r\n        return new Error(message);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Get better-sqlite3 module\r\n     * Only call after ensureLoaded() succeeds\r\n     */\r\n    getDatabase(): any {\r\n        return require('better-sqlite3');\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n"
}

## 🤖 Assistant #19 (Agent)

_2025-12-27 06:25Z_

The changes are complete. Here's what I fixed:

## Problem
The extension was packaging **only Windows binaries** because `download-all-binaries.js` was downloading binaries for the current platform only. When a macOS user installs the extension, the Windows `.node` file fails to load with the error "not a mach-o file".

## Solution

### 1. Updated `scripts/download-all-binaries.js`
- Now downloads binaries for **all 6 platform/architecture combinations**:
  - `win32-x64`, `win32-ia32`
  - `darwin-x64`, `darwin-arm64` (Intel & Apple Silicon Macs)
  - `linux-x64`, `linux-arm64`
- Downloads for **10 Electron versions** (32-41) to cover various VS Code/Cursor versions
- Uses new naming convention: `better_sqlite3-electron-{version}-{platform}-{arch}.node`

### 2. Updated `src/sqlite-loader.ts`
- At runtime, selects the correct binary based on `process.platform` and `process.arch`
- Falls back to legacy naming convention for backwards compatibility
- Better error messages when no compatible binary is found

## To rebuild and test:

```powershell
# Re-download binaries for all platforms
npm run download-all-binaries

# Rebuild and package
npm run package
```

**⚠️ Note:** The extension package will be significantly larger now (~60-100MB) because it includes binaries for all platforms. This is the standard approach for cross-platform native module distribution in VS Code extensions.

## 🤖 Assistant #22 (Agent)

_2025-12-27 06:28Z_

根据刚才更新的 `download-all-binaries.js` 配置：

## 平台/架构组合：6 个

| 平台 | 架构 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| `win32` | `x64` | Windows 64位 |
| `win32` | `ia32` | Windows 32位 |
| `darwin` | `x64` | macOS Intel |
| `darwin` | `arm64` | macOS Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) |
| `linux` | `x64` | Linux 64位 |
| `linux` | `arm64` | Linux ARM64 |

## Electron 版本：10 个

| 版本 | 对应 IDE |
|------|----------|
| `32.0.0` | 较旧的 VS Code |
| `33.0.0` | VS Code 中间版本 |
| `34.0.0` | VS Code 中间版本 |
| `35.0.0` | VS Code 中间版本 |
| `36.0.0` | VS Code 中间版本 |
| `37.0.0` | **Cursor 2.x** |
| `38.0.0` | VS Code 中间版本 |
| `39.0.0` | **VS Code 1.93+** |
| `40.0.0` | 未来版本 |
| `41.0.0` | 未来版本 |

## 总计

**6 个平台 × 10 个版本 = 最多 60 个二进制文件**

不过实际上，`prebuild-install` 可能不会为所有组合都提供预编译的二进制文件（某些旧版本可能没有），所以实际下载的数量可能会少一些。

每个 `.node` 文件大约 2-3MB，如果全部下载成功，包大小会增加约 **120-180MB**。

/**\r\n     * Test if current binary is loadable\r\n     */\r\n    private async testBinary(): Promise<boolean> {\r\n        if (!fs.existsSync(this.binaryPath)) {\r\n            console.log('Binary 'cursor';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Check process arguments and working directory\r\n        const cwd = process.cwd();\r\n        const execPath = process.execPath;\r\n\r\n        if (execPath platform=${platform}, arch=${arch}`);\r\n\r\n        // Try to find a matching binary for current platform/arch and electron version\r\n        for (const version of versionsToTry) {\r\n            // New naming convention: better_sqlite3-electron-{version}-{platform}-{arch}.node\r\n            const binaryName = `better_sqlite3-electron-${version}-${platform}-${arch}.node`;\r\n            const binaryPath = path.join(binaryDir, binaryName);\r\n\r\n            if (fs.existsSync(binaryPath)) {\r\n                console.log(`✅ Using pre-packaged binary: ${binaryName}`);\r\n                fs.copyFileSync(binaryPath, targetPath);\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Fallback: try old naming convention (backwards compatibility)\r\n        for (const version of versionsToTry) {\r\n            const oldBinaryName = `better_sqlite3-${version}.node`;\r\n            const oldBinaryPath = path.join(binaryDir, oldBinaryName);\r\n\r\n            if   return;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Try to find ANY binary for the current platform/arch\r\n        if (fs.existsSync(binaryDir)) {\r\n            const files = console.log('No pre-packaged binaries found for current platform/architecture');\r\n\r\n        // If the default binary exists, check if it's compatible\r\n        if (fs.existsSync(targetPath)) ideType === 'cursor' ? (matchingBinaries.length > 0 && !fs.existsSync(defaultBinaryPath)) {\r\n    const bestMatch = matchingBinaries[0];\r\n    fs.copyFileSync(\r\n        path.join(binaryDir, bestMatch),\r\n        defaultBinaryPath\r\n    );\r\n    console.log(`\\n📋 Created default fallback for current platform: ${bestMatch} -> better_sqlite3.node`);\r\n} else if (binaries.length > 0 && role: msg.role,\r\n                    content: this.extractTextContent(msg.content),\r\n                    timestamp: msg.ts ? new Date(msg.ts).toISOString() : new Date().toISOString(),\r\n                    model: msg.model\r\n                };\r\n                messages.push(message);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return messages;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private extractTextContent(content: any): string {\r\n        if (typeof content === 'string') {\r\n            return content;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (Array.isArray(content)) {\r\n            const parts: string[] = [];\r\n            \r\n            for (const item of content) {\r\n                if (!item) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 处理 text 类型\r\n                if (item.type === 'text' && item.text) {\r\n                    parts.push(item.text);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理 thinking 类型（Kilo/Cline 的思考过程）\r\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_result' && item.content) {\r\n                    // tool_result 内容可能很长，只取摘要\r\n                    const resultPreview = typeof item.content === 'string' \r\n                        ? item.content.substring(0, 500) \r\n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\r\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\r\n                else if (item.text) {\r\n                    parts.push(item.text);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\r\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\r\n            return content.text;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function getKiloStoragePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n\r\n    const isVSCode = process.env.VSCODE_CWD !== undefined || process.env.VSCODE_PID !== undefined;\r\n    const isCursor = process.env.CURSOR_PID !== undefined || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER !== undefined;\r\n\r\n    let appName = 'Code';\r\n    if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {\r\n        appName = 'Cursor';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `AppData/Roaming/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `Library/Application Support/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);\r\n    } else {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `.config/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n",

## 🤖 Assistant #40 (Agent)

_2025-12-27 07:05Z_

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> Found it. Looking at the `getKiloStoragePath()` function:
>
> For macOS (`darwin`) in VS Code:
> - `appName` defaults to `'Code'` (for VS Code)
> - Path is: `~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`
>
> And then the `KiloReader` adds `/tasks` to this path.
>
> So the full path on macOS in VS Code is:
> ```
> ~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code/tasks
> ```

</details>

## 🤖 Assistant #41 (Agent)

_2025-12-27 07:05Z_

根据 `kilo-reader.ts` 中的 `getKiloStoragePath()` 函数：

## macOS + VS Code 下 Kilo 读取的目录

```
~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code
```

具体来说，对话数据存储在 `tasks` 子目录：

```
~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code/tasks/
```

## 相关代码

```230:249:src/agents/kilo/kilo-reader.ts
export function getKiloStoragePath(): string {
    const platform = process.platform;
    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';

    const isVSCode = process.env.VSCODE_CWD !== undefined || process.env.VSCODE_PID !== undefined;
    const isCursor = process.env.CURSOR_PID !== undefined || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER !== undefined;

    let appName = 'Code';
    if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {
        appName = 'Cursor';
    }

    if (platform === 'win32') {
        return path.join(homeDir, `AppData/Roaming/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);
    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {
        return path.join(homeDir, `Library/Application Support/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);
    } else {
        return path.join(homeDir, `.config/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);
    }
}
```

## 各平台路径汇总

| 平台 | IDE | 路径 |
|------|-----|------|
| macOS | VS Code | `~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code` |
| macOS | Cursor | `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code` |
| Windows | VS Code | `%APPDATA%\Code\User\globalStorage\kilocode.kilo-code` |
| Windows | Cursor | `%APPDATA%\Cursor\User\globalStorage\kilocode.kilo-code` |
| Linux | VS Code | `~/.config/Code/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code` |
